texto: Poetry, music, forests, oceans, solitude--they were what developed enormous spiritual strength. I came to realize that spirit, as much or more than physical conditioning, had to be stored up before a race.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Herb Elliott sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Poetry, music, forests, oceans, solitude--they were what developed enormous spiritual strength. I…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, running, poetry, útil em momentos de reflexao.
